An Unforgettable Dining Experience

Where authentic Portuguese tradition meets modern culinary artistry. Every dish tells a story of passion, heritage, and the finest local ingredients.

A Story of Passion & Heritage

Founded in the heart of Lisbon, Boalisboa represents the culmination of generations of culinary tradition. Our executive chef, António Silva, brings over 20 years of experience from Michelin-starred kitchens across Europe.

We source only the freshest ingredients from local markets and trusted Portuguese suppliers. From the Atlantic's finest seafood to the rich flavors of Alentejo pork, every element on your plate has been carefully selected for quality and authenticity.

Our intimate dining space, with its warm lighting and elegant décor, creates the perfect backdrop for memorable moments—whether it's a romantic dinner, a family celebration, or a business gathering.

— Chef António Silva

Our Signature Dishes

Discover our chef's carefully curated selection of Portuguese classics and modern creations

Chef's Special

Moussaka de Berinjela

€14.50

Layers of roasted eggplant, seasoned ground beef, and béchamel sauce baked to golden perfection. A Mediterranean masterpiece with Portuguese soul.

Bestseller

Lasanha da Casa

€13.90

Homemade pasta sheets layered with slow-cooked beef ragù, creamy béchamel, and aged Portuguese cheese. Comfort food elevated to art.

Bife à Boalisboa

€18.50

Premium beef tenderloin topped with fried egg and ham, served with crispy golden fries and sautéed peppers. Our signature twist on a classic.

Traditional

Bacalhau à Brás

€16.90

Shredded salted cod with golden straw potatoes, onions, and scrambled eggs. A Lisbon classic that has stood the test of time.

Polvo à Lagareiro

€22.00

Grilled octopus with roasted potatoes, garlic, and olive oil. Tender, smoky, and irresistibly flavorful. Simply the best from the Atlantic.

For Two

Arroz de Marisco

€32.00

Rich seafood rice with prawns, clams, mussels, and lobster in a savory tomato broth. Perfect for sharing and savoring together.

Guest Experiences

What our visitors say about their time at Boalisboa

★★★★★

"Absolutely phenomenal. The Bacalhau à Brás was the best I've had in Lisbon, and the wine pairing was perfect. A must-visit for any food lover."

Maria Santos

Food Blogger, Porto

★★★★★

"We celebrated our anniversary here and it was magical. The staff made us feel like family, and every course was a work of art. Unforgettable evening."

James & Sarah Mitchell

London, UK

★★★★★

"As a local, I've tried many restaurants in Lisbon, but Boalisboa stands out. The attention to detail, the flavors, the atmosphere—everything is top-notch."

Pedro Costa

Lisbon Resident
